mechanism: CLO reinvestment expirations remove the marginal bid for leveraged loans precisely when $900B-$1.5T of sub-IG debt needs refinancing, reducing demand for new-issue loans and widening spreads. Simultaneous pressure from supply (maturity wall) and demand withdrawal (CLO expiration).
regime_dependence: Time-bound to 2025-2028. Severity depends on SOFR path and CLO reset activity viability. If SOFR declines sufficiently, CLO arbitrage restores and demand returns.
